North Country Colocation Services Corp. (Data center company)
State Street Target Retirement 2035 Fund Class K Shares (SSCKX)
I will retain my vested stock options upon separation. (2022-04-01)

NYDIG is the ultimate parent company of North Country Colocation Services Corp. (NCCS), whose parent company was acquired by NYDIG in August 2024.  The NCCS 401K plan was terminated and its assets were transferred to the NYDIG 401K plan post-acquisition, but I am still employed by NCCS.
I will continue to participate in this defined contribution plan.  The plan sponsor will not make further contributions after my separation. (2024-08-01)
I will retain my position as Sole Member/President of C.R. Ventures LLC. I will not receive any fees for the services that I provide to the LLC during my appointment. (1999-05-01)
